Predict the star ratings (integer between 1 and 5) to the following product reviews. Return your response in json format like this example {"rating1":integer,"rating2":integer,...}. Please avoid providing additional explanations. Reviews:
1. ordered two heaters both were defective i ordered one of these heaters it was broken when i received it i could see and hear a screw inside of the heater loose when i turned it on the fan did not work the heating element stopped working after being plugged in for just a few minutes and then it started smoking it didnt even turn on after that i requested a replacement heater which came a few days later the replacement heater had the same exact issues a screw was loose inside of the heater where i cannot reach it the heating element only worked for a few minutes before shutting off and the fan did not turn on additionally the second heater also started smoking as soon as the heating element turned on i will never buy this product again and you shouldnt either it is clearly very cheap craftsmanship i will be using a different brand forever and all eternity

Predict the star ratings (integer between 1 and 5) to the following product reviews. Return your response in json format like this example {"rating1":integer,"rating2":integer,...}. Please avoid providing additional explanations. Reviews:
1. damaged item loose rattly bits inside potentially dangerous return or exchange the heater i received is damaged or defective there is a loose small piece ratting around inside the heater which sounds to be a loose screw or broken small loose piece inside also the rectangular heating element inside is wobbly not firmly fastened or fixed in place this cant be right it makes this heater potentially dangerous to operate it could short circuit come further apart internally or jam i would not trust it not to burn down my house except for this damage or defect it appears it would be acceptableregrettably i must request return or replacement

Predict the star ratings (integer between 1 and 5) to the following product reviews. Return your response in json format like this example {"rating1":integer,"rating2":integer,...}. Please avoid providing additional explanations. Reviews:
1. disappointed heater just stops working i have purchased 2 of these same heaters the first one day just stopped working while in use but i gave it the benefit since i had it a little over a year and it wasnt really expensive i just keep them at my office to use when im cold so i decided to purchase another one in hope that id be able to get longer use out of the second one well i was wrong my 2nd heater was delivered in july of this year and it is only august and its been used 3 times and yep you guessed it it completely just shut off after being turned on for 3 mins the heater is in no way overheated and ive gone through your troubleshooting suggestions and of course its past the deadline for return this is disappointing

1. replacement for damaged one is also damaged so these heaters are pretty good but the packaging andor quality control is terrible the first one arrived completely broken as the fan was broken off inside so we asked for a refund and got another one we just received the second one to replace the damaged one and it too is damaged but not enough to affect the function of the heater the screen on the front is dented which makes it look like garbage but at least it works the boxes that both heaters came in were not damaged in shipping at all we arent bothering to return this one because it does work but we dont have time to go through the process of returning it

1. check it when delivered qc issues the media could not be loaded bought this in december but then we had abnormal weather so didnt need it until february when i first tried it there was no fan at all and i just figured it didnt put out much and was quiet but then one day the fan tried to start and you could tell it wasnt right please watch video of fan i was out of return window so i know i am stuck with it you can see by the picture that a screw is completely removed from factory this is poor quality control being i was passed the return window i took it apart and fixed the unit myself the screw that was loose and another screw held the fan blades center so once i replaced it everything it worked perfect the unit overall is a good one and puts out good heat you just got to try it right away to make sure you got one fully put together hope this helps

1. loved it until i didnt it stopped working i tend to hate little portable electric heaters like this because the ones ive had in the past have poor safety elements but i loved this little thing and it heated my room up so well and so quick but after just a couple weeks of having it it stopped working for no reason no falls no drops all of the outlets ive used work with everything but the heater i wouldnt leave it on when i wasnt in the room it doesnt even turn on the safety switch on the bottom looks the same as it did the day i got it so i dont think its because of that i ended up having to get a portable radiator heater instead which heats up significantly slower but its proven to last longer than this one did it was a good heater but it should last more than a couple of weeks of moderate use

1. was i the only one who had never heard of these ill start by saying that every kitchen needs these i dont want to think about how much ive spent on aluminum foil or parchment paper over the years i was floored when i found out that other people used these insteadi had a cookie baking day recently with my sister and tried these out for the first time on her recommendation the cookies turned out perfect and they didnt stick to the pan they are also dishwasher safe although they are a little hard to position in the dishwasher since theyre so large and floppy ive also baked chicken on one of these and it turned out incredible they fit quartersheet baking pans perfectly and theyre already one of my musthaves in the kitchen

1. cheap poor quality if youre considering using these baking cups id advise you to hesitate and reevaluate in my experience the material of the cups seems to either leach out some sort of substance or causes precipitates from water to deposit on its surface leaving behind a white residue that is difficult to remove this residue can even transfer to your fingers and leave them feeling oddly abrasive which is a concerning issue for a product that is intended to come into contact with food ive also noticed a slight transfer of rubber or soap odor and taste to the baked goods which could indicate that there might be impurities or contaminants in the material all of these factors combined make me hesitant to trust this product for use in baking anything intended for consumption yes these are cheap but theres a reason for that

1. excellent product and customer service i was skeptical about these as i have read mixed reviews but after using them for over a year i can say that these are the best shooting bluetoothnoise cancelingtouch control earbuds i have found they pair automatically cancel pulsegunfire sounds while letting background sound through take and make calls well and they sound fine playing podcasts or music they arent gonna deliver booming bass but theyre completely great for functionality and they do everything they say theyll do i am an avid shooter and i also work behind a 372xp chainsaw every day and have tried 3 different sets of various brands of bluetooth noise cancelling earphones and have been disappointed with them all until i found these the others all stay in the drawer now because these caldwells are great the slide volume control must be swept up or down a few times as each sweep does a small adjustment but once you get the hang of it it works fine to adjust volume all the other touch controls are fairly intuitive and straight forward these work one at a time as a single earpiece or simultaneously as bluetooth headphones and have fully ambidextrousidentical controls on each bud although there is a right and left earbud either bud can be used in either ear they stay securely in the ears once you find your proper tip that fits i use the large foam tips for the best fitsealnoise protection and the fde color matches a couple of my guns and gearthe foam tips must be used for sufficient ear protection while shooting outdoors anything nonmagnum is fine with these indoor range visits and id double up with earmuffs worn over these for full sound protectionoverall i am extremely happy with these one or both of them are in my ears almost all day long they have a few specific quirks that i had to figure out see resyncing process outlined below but these are hands down the best bluetooth noise cancelling earbuds around for the price on the newer model of these the emax pro version i think that caldwell shouldnt have made the right and left earbuds have different controls on the new pro these original shadows are far more utilitarian with the exact same touch controls on either earbud just something to consider if youre deciding between these or the pros id pick these original emax shadows all day long over the new pros for that reasonmany have complained about the earbuds losing sync with each other and then the user has a very difficult time getting them to sync with each other again as a set i can say that the number one cause of them not syncing with each other is because whatever bluetooth device they were paired to must be turned off when these earbuds lose sync with each other their device usually a phone will then recognize each earbud as a separate unit and only one earbud will give sound at a time the fix for this is1 turn off your phone so no bluetooth pairing is possible with that device these earbuds will not sync again if one or both of them is paired with a phone or similar device or if said device or any other device within range remembers either of them and is trying to pair with them turn off the device2 perform the factory reset it is a 20 second process that has a youtube video under caldwell emax shadows factory reset3 once factory reset is complete making sure your phone remains off place earbuds back in their charging case and make sure the light on the back of each is either solid green fully charged or solid red partially chargedneed charging4 remove both earbuds from case at the same time and place them in your ears they should turn on and pair to each other automatically in a few seconds usually if you put them right in your ears you will hear the paired boop sound in both earbuds you can perform a 2 second touchhold on one earbud to activate passthrough mode and listen if both earbuds then allow you to hear outside sounds make sure your phone remains off for these steps if long hold on one earbud doesnt activate passthrough mode on both earbuds they arent synced and the first steps outlined here should be performed again5 once youve determined that they are synced by doing the passthrough mode test you can turn your phone back on enable bluetooth and click on shadows under your bluetooth menu click on it and you are back in business with a paired status on your phone and a boop sound in both ears to confirm the connectionyour phone must be turned off and factory reset performed for them to sync with each other once they become unsynced or else your phone will pair with each earbud as a separate bluetooth device preventing them from ever syncing with each other that can be really frustrating so follow the steps abovei hope this helps those who have been frustrated by them not syncingthese are great bluetooth shooting earbuds especially for the price i own 3 sets so i always have a charged one or pair in my earscaldwell for the win if you have any problem with these contact caldwell and they will take care of you with excellent customer service and warranty

1. conductor is copper clad steel make sure you know what the conductor is for cables these and other popular brands use copper clad steel which is not as good a conductor as oxygen free copper chances are they will work just fine but they will be worse the longer the cable gets plus why not have the better conductor regardless of the distancecopper clad steel ccs is a composite conductor material containing a low carbon steel core surrounded by copper the copper provides the electrical conductivity and the steel contributes strength to the conductor the most common grade of ccs used for electrical conductors has a nominal 40 iacs electrical conductivity ccs is suitable for applications where high strength and medium conductivity are required copper clad steel is also suited for high frequency signal applications since high frequency currents travel mainly in the outer skin of a conductor fiskalloy
